offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual transaction processing causes late reports. We automate report generation instead of manual bookkeeping and spreadsheet management.
problem: Manual processing of financial transactions leads to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try transaction entry and error-checking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
